title: pakistani currency
description: The Pakistani Currency Mod introduces a unique, immersive economy system to Minecraft, featuring realistic Pakistani currency notes! This mod brings currency items from 50 Rupees to 5000 Rupees.
body:
## Pakistani Currency Mod
This mod introduces a fully integrated set of Pakistani currency notes into Minecraft, adding an immersive and culturally relevant way to exchange currency in the game. Perfect for players looking to add a touch of local flair, this mod features items modeled after real-world Pakistani currency, from 50 Rupee notes up to 5000 Rupee notes.

🎮 Gameplay and Use These notes function as collectible and tradable items, seamlessly integrating into your gameplay. While these items don’t have inherent economic functions like traditional currency, they can be used creatively for bartering in custom gameplay setups, role-playing, or creating Pakistani-themed servers.

🔄 Currency Exchange System Although future updates may expand on this, the initial release introduces currency items as standalone collectibles. Players and server admins can use these notes as they see fit, whether for trading or creating immersive economic systems with friends.

📥 Installation and Compatibility This mod is compatible with Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1. Just download and place it in your mods folder to bring the Pakistani currency experience into Minecraft.

💼 Upcoming Features In future releases, we plan to expand this mod with additional items and functionality, potentially including a currency exchange machine, customizable denominations, and more uses for currency in survival and adventure modes.

Why Download?

Adds an authentic touch to Minecraft with unique, culturally significant currency items.
Ideal for custom servers, role-playing, and unique gameplay experiences.
Simple to install and ready to use with any Fabric setup.
